What We Offer

Everything we do.
Rooted in wellness.

Every activation we deliver is built entirely around wellness — done with genuine depth and care. That's what makes the difference between something that looks good and something that genuinely resonates.

Work with us →

Yoga + Breathwork Activations

Guided yoga, breathwork and movement experiences designed around your brand and audience — led by qualified practitioners we source, vet and manage end-to-end.

Most Requested

Brand Activations

Immersive, on-brand activation experiences that connect your brand with your audience in a real, memorable way — from concept through to execution, entirely managed by us.

Signature Service

Product Launches

Bring your product to life through experience. We design and run launch activations that tell your product's story through immersive moments people feel, share and remember.

Brand Defining

Corporate Wellbeing Sessions

Tailored wellbeing experiences for your team — breathwork, movement, and mindfulness sessions that are professionally run, genuinely engaging, and available anywhere across Australia.

Australia Wide

How It Works

Simple for you.
Seamless for your guests.

1

Brief us

Tell us about your event — brand, audience, date, and vision. We ask the right questions to build something that actually fits your world.

Takes 5 minutes

2

We concept

Within 48 hours we come back with a tailored activation concept — yoga and breathwork formats, brand experience design, and a transparent quote. No generic proposals.

Back to you in 48 hours

3

We build

We handle every detail — sourcing practitioners, branding, logistics, and travel arrangements across Australia. You see and approve everything before the day.

We handle everything

4

You show up

We arrive, set up, and run the entire event. You show up to a fully running activation. We manage everything on the day so you can focus on your guests.

Truly hands-off

Who We Work With

We work with people who
take wellness seriously.

01

Corporate Teams

Running annual wellbeing days, mental health activations, or team reset sessions. You need a partner who handles everything and delivers a day that actually moves your people — serviced anywhere in Australia.

Full Service
02

Wellness Brands

Hosting community activations or brand partnership launches. You need experiences that feel genuinely native to the wellness world — considered, immersive and on-brand from start to finish.

Brand Events

"If wellness is your world, Wellvision is built for you."

We've activated for brands across Australia and travel anywhere for the right brief.

What Clients Say

Brands that trusted us
came back.

Wellvision created something genuinely special at Gwinganna. The breathwork and cold plunge experience was immersive, beautifully run, and exactly on-brand. Our influencers were blown away.

Original & Mineral
Organic Haircare Brand — Gwinganna Retreat

The ice baths and breathwork session Wellvision ran for our members was next level. Professionally delivered, the energy in the room was incredible. Our community absolutely loved it.

The Yard Gym
Group Fitness Gym — Mooloolaba

VPA Australia
Supplement Brand — 250+ Person Event
